draws.title: Two of Swords
draws.message: Two paths are asking for your attention. Choose with your whole self, not only your fear. In the realm of swords, your air medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: speak clearly without using truth as a weapon.

draws.title: Ace of Swords
draws.message: A new beginning is glowing. Protect the spark before demanding the harvest. In the realm of swords, your air medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: speak clearly without using truth as a weapon.

draws.title: The Moon
draws.message: Not all shadows are warnings. Some are invitations inward.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: listen to what your dreams are trying to soften.

draws.title: Ten of Wands
draws.message: A cycle is heavy, full, or ready to transform. You may put some of it down. In the realm of wands, your fire medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: move one spark from idea into action.

draws.title: Ace of Cups
draws.message: A new beginning is glowing. Protect the spark before demanding the harvest. In the realm of cups, your water medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: respond with emotional honesty and care.

draws.action: Scatter stardust: stop forcing and look again.

draws.title: Strength
draws.message: Your softness is not the opposite of strength. It is part of it.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: meet one hard thing with gentleness.

draws.title: Knight of Pentacles
draws.message: Energy is moving quickly. Aim it with intention. In the realm of pentacles, your earth medicine is asking to be honored.
draws.action: Scatter stardust: care for the practical thing right in front of you.
